title: Paradigm
description: Configuration defining an inflectional paradigm or sub-paradigm.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

part_of_speech.description: The category of the root (e.g., verb, noun).

filter.description: Logic to select specific lexical roots from the lexicon.

stage_order.description: The ordered stages of morphological application.

global_markers.description: Markers or rules applied to every form in the paradigm.

feature_markers.description: Mapping of features to single feature values or marker files to import, or null if only ContingentFeatureMarkers are used.

oneOf.description: Feature value or file reference (starts with $).
Indicates that no FeatureMarkers class is loaded, and that marking is instead handled by ContingentFeatureMarkers

feature_value_combinations.description: Imported defining valid feature cross-products. If blank, all combinations of features are generated.
